description: Fix numeric string sorting as text instead of numbers
goal: Fix SortScores to sort numerically descending, not lexicographically
expected_behavior: SortScores should return scores in descending numeric order: 200, 100, 50, 9. The bug is that $ORDER iterates ascending by default — fix by iterating in reverse with $ORDER(temp(key), -1).
hints: The $ORDER function iterates local array subscripts in ascending numeric order
To reverse (descending), use $ORDER(temp(key), -1) — second argument -1 goes backwards
Seed the backwards $ORDER with $ORDER(temp(''), -1) to get the LAST key first, then iterate
Do NOT use string comparison — numeric values stored as subscripts automatically sort numerically
